title: Buket
description: Remove any fluid without having to worry with the storage.
body: # Buket A simple an easy way to remove fluids without having to raid temples for sponges. The Buket is crafted using one ender pearl and four empty bucket. ![](https://bm.jae.fi/mr/craft.png) Some examples of usage: ![](https://bm.jae.fi/mr/lava.gif) ![](https://bm.jae.fi/mr/water.gif) Icon and bucket texture made by [Java](https://matrix.to/#/@java:furry.lol). Code by [Jae](https://matrix.to/#/@me:jae.fi).
